name: fluent
description: Fluent — AI Language Learning Kit. Personal AI tutor for any target language. Uses spaced repetition (FSRS-6), active recall, adaptive difficulty, and tracking across 6 databases. Daily practice: /fluent-review, /fluent-vocab, /fluent-writing, /fluent-speaking, /fluent-reading, /fluent-learn. Start with /fluent-setup.
